{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220504539F755BF5ACC0B98EA1DA"}"},"total":2289},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7331153070815003454","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"就我目前看过的神豪文，乃至整个🍅小说，这一本绝对能排到前三
后宫神豪文最大的困难就是整理后宫，这个作者不光理得井井有条，而且每一条后宫线都性格突出形象鲜明，最后再慢慢整合，既保证真实性和代入感，还能看得爽，主线的搞钱事业还能稳步发展，肯定下了不少功夫
骚话也是真的多，经常半夜被窝里憋笑的感觉你懂吗[笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706922505,"group_id":"7273292106704096318","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人很帅，什么也没留下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxeXs+DwfO13maRaRnIKLJU4XlbZ70lZQq4ldEWIyq6c","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/335b544b474e494fbee7541bc8d86761~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701259&x-signature=fW1YcPFyp6LAj7WqwuJrzMvstqs%3D","user_id":"3342945603293643","user_name":"SkyCollector"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3342945603293643","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7273292106704096318","book_info":{"abstract":"重生前——
校花：“抱歉，上大学前我不想谈恋爱。”
校花妈妈：“你配不上我女儿，请你不要耽误她的前程。”
重生后——
校花妈妈：“傻女儿，女追男隔层纱，叶轩不想理你，你就去追他啊！”
校花：“叶轩，我喜欢你，你做我男朋友吧。”
叶轩两手插兜：“作为理科状元，京大学子，数家独角兽企业的创始人，唱、跳、rap、篮球等行业的领军者，身家几千亿的富豪，我想当个渣男……不过分吧？”
重生04，激活【第二人生系统】后，叶轩就打定主意——这一世，不当舔狗，做个俗人，赏尽人间风与雪，品尽天下花与月！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d829da270cc6d64bc98b4eaef5f34c75","author":"三两桃花二两酒","author_id":"","book_id":"7273292106704096318","book_name":"都重生了我当个渣男怎么了","book_short_name":"开局拒绝校花，我的第二人生系统","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7273292389811225150","read_count":"66274","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2670424"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"1368","tags":"都市种田,都市,系统,重生,多女主,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ca2ee08e6086d2c1d37f190eb4be308e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311094&x-signature=vrYl8qrCnU7Zb%2BjUDvuiZgAdds0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3254993596976375","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"429"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220504539F755BF5ACC0B98EA1DA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评" 阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":42227,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":155363},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1698331095,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7400965966363525950","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很新颖，虽然删减很多，但仍然好看，角色的特点也比较到位，虞幼薇这个人物也很惹人喜爱，但还是有人发出过不好的声音，我个人认为多数人物很不错，主角叶轩也很有个性，可谓是集中了很多小说男主的优点，虽然很渣，但很坦然，故事的衔接也很到位，但希望每次到了关键地方不要就6个点，虽说也不要详细，但意思一下还是要的（以上是我看到五百章左右的看法）最后希望作者能继续往高质量发展，在自己擅长的领域不断创新。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723175107,"group_id":"7273292106704096318","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5swpRezDtqjwN6ii338zdJQEaBwZgplc8pYr9Ae3Z6r","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0aa5ac7ccfaf450fb1fc1abf746c9c0b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703016&x-signature=36ZCzP6pFNE1rOM%2B4zs1SAVFFK8%3D","user_id":"3891901515969143","user_name":"卷破重云现晴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3891901515969143","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7273292106704096318","book_info":{"abstract":"重生前——
